changes.before: Outside, the village kept coughing in the cold morning while bread smoke rose over the roofs unchanged.
changes.after: Outside, villagers kept coughing in the cold morning while bread smoke rose over the roofs unchanged.

changes.before: The bakery was just visible through the corner of the window.
changes.after: Through the corner of the window, the bakery was just visible.

changes.before: Bread from the communal pot. Bread at home. Heavy bread-eaters sicker than the rest. The shepherd nearly spared. The child scarcely touched.
changes.after: Bread from the communal pot and bread at home; the heavy bread-eaters were sicker than the rest, while the shepherd was nearly spared and the child scarcely touched.

changes.before: Sylvanas went still. "The first delivery is untouched."
changes.after: Sylvanas's hand stayed on the granary latch. "The first delivery is untouched."

changes.before: Someone had made it to do that.
Bread from the communal pot. Bread at home. Heavy bread-eaters sicker than the rest. The shepherd nearly spared. The child scarcely touched.
changes.after: Bread from the communal pot and bread at home; the heavy bread-eaters were sicker than the rest, while the shepherd was nearly spared and the child scarcely touched.

changes.before: She knew too well what the other half of that promise might be worth.
She was already waiting for Jaina's half of it.
changes.after: She was already waiting for Jaina's read on the grain.

changes.before: She knew too well what the other half of that promise might be worth.
